questions.question: What is ScholarPath?
questions.answer: ScholarPath is a comprehensive study abroad platform that provides personalized guidance, scholarship matching, and end-to-end support for students seeking international education opportunities.

questions.question: How does ScholarPath work?
questions.answer: We start with a free consultation to understand your goals, then match you with suitable scholarships and universities. Our consultants guide you through every step from application to arrival.

questions.question: Is ScholarPath free?
questions.answer: We offer a free Basic tier with scholarship matching and application checklists. Our Pro ($199) and Premium ($499) tiers provide additional services like application review and end-to-end support.

questions.question: How do I find scholarships?
questions.answer: Use our advanced scholarship search filters to find opportunities by country, degree level, field of study, and funding type. Our AI matcher can also recommend scholarships based on your profile.

questions.question: What types of scholarships are available?
questions.answer: We offer merit-based, need-based, and country-specific scholarships. Options range from partial funding to full rides covering tuition, living expenses, and travel.

questions.question: What if my visa is rejected?
questions.answer: We provide comprehensive visa preparation support with a 98% success rate. If your visa is rejected, we'll help you understand the reasons, strengthen your application, and reapply with enhanced documentation.

questions.question: How long does the application process take?
questions.answer: Timeline varies by country and program, typically ranging from 3-6 months. We start early to ensure you meet all deadlines and have time for visa processing.

questions.question: What documents do I need?
questions.answer: Common requirements include academic transcripts, language test scores (IELTS/TOEFL), statement of purpose, letters of recommendation, and financial documentation. We provide a customized checklist based on your target country.

questions.question: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.answer: We accept credit/debit cards via Stripe, bank transfers, and installment plans for Premium packages. All payments are secure and encrypted.

questions.question: What is your refund policy?
questions.answer: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee if we cannot match you with at least one suitable scholarship. Full terms are available in our Refund Policy page.
